description: Machine-readable index of AbilityAPP core processes. Human summary: docs/processes/README.md

processes.name: Enquiry to client
processes.summary: Converts an enquiry into a new support receiver client, links them, sets enquiry status to Converted, and opens the client record.
processes.trigger: User clicks Convert to client on an enquiry detail page

processes.name: Assign employee credential
processes.summary: Add or update credential rows on an employee Business Partner record.
processes.trigger: User edits Credentials Assigned lines on an employee record

processes.name: Assign client to location
processes.summary: Link support receivers to a support location with assignment role and dates.
processes.trigger: User adds or edits client lines on a location Clients tab

processes.name: Assign employee to location
processes.summary: Link staff to a support location with assignment role and dates.
processes.trigger: User adds or edits employee lines on a location Employees tab

processes.name: Assign product to location
processes.summary: Link products and services from the catalog to a support location.
processes.trigger: User adds or edits product lines on a location Products and services tab

processes.name: Assign task
processes.summary: Create and assign a task to a user or role from a record or the task hub.
processes.trigger: User clicks Assign task on a record tasks panel or task hub

processes.name: Action task
processes.summary: Start, complete, or cancel tasks assigned to the signed-in user or their role.
processes.trigger: User updates task status on a task detail page or hub

processes.name: Submit leave request
processes.summary: Staff submit leave from My workplace; task and review queue route approval to manager or HR.

processes.name: Submit employee credential
processes.summary: Staff submit credentials from My workplace; HR reviews via task and review queue.

processes.name: Submit leave on behalf
processes.summary: Managers submit leave for another employee from Workforce planning.
processes.trigger: Manager submits leave on Workforce planning submit form

processes.name: Review employee credential
processes.summary: HR approves or rejects pending credentials; closes automation task.
processes.trigger: HR acts in workforce review queue or employee credentials tab

processes.name: Approve leave request
processes.summary: HR or line manager approves or declines leave; deducts balance and closes automation task.
processes.trigger: Manager or HR acts in workforce review queue

processes.name: Financial month close
processes.summary: Finance confirms plan, claims, invoices, and payroll checks then marks a calendar month closed.
processes.trigger: User marks month closed on Financial close after checklist passes
